case_title: TERRY WASHINGTON VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-12-2016 CONTINUED TO APR-12-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Continued To Oct-18-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff Terry Washington is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Oct-18-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***NOTE: If Self-represented Plaintiff fails to appear at the next Order to Show Cause hearing, the Court intends to dismiss this case pursuant to government code section 68608(b).*** JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2016 Continued To Jul-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to JUL-12-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Continued To Apr-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Apr-12-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
